title: Western blot protocol for detecting ATP10B in mouse/rat brain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b3svh","text":"Protocol for detection of ATP10B in rat and mouse brain tissue by Western blotting","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"bo19s","text":"Perform protein extraction from snap-frozen brain tissue:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bntmb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6d78c","text":"- weigh tissue","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d2779","text":"- add RIPA buffer (see Materials) : 10 X of the weight (40 mg = 400 µL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9tm2g","text":"- homogenize samples using sample homogenizer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"frons","text":"- sonicate samples at 4 degrees C, 3 times 15 seconds (keep the samples on ice between each sonication)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5s1sg","text":"- centrifuge samples at 6000 g for 10 minutes at 4 degrees C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b0cf1","text":"- collect supernatant and measure protein concentration","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4bt91","text":"- aliquot protein extracts and store at -20 degrees C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Prepare samples for Western blotting : 30 µg proteins in 12 µL of volume (adjust with milliQ water) 2.4 µL of 6X SDS buffer + 10% of β-mercaptoethanol
Load samples, together with 7 µL of mass marker (PageRuler™ Plus Prestained Protein Ladder) on a 3-8% NuPAGE™ Tris-Acetate gel. Use NuPAGE™ Tris-Acetate SDS Running Buffer for migration.
Run the gel at 150V for another 00:45:00

Transfer the proteins on PVDF membrane (Trans-Blot® TurboTM PVDF Membrane) using Trans-Blot Turbo Transfer System (Bio-Rad), using the pre-programmed protocol STANDARD SD: 00:30:00 , up to 1.0 A, 25 V.
Block membranes for 01:00:00 using 5% milk dissolved in PBS-T 0,1% at Room temperature
Incubate membranes Overnight in ATP10B HPA034574 (Sigma) diluted 1/500 in 5% milk PBS-T 0,1% at 4 °C
Wash membranes with PBS-T 0,1% for 10 minutes, 5 times at Room temperature : PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00
Incubate membranes for 02:00:00 in secondary antibody solution Goat anti-rabbit HRP (Dako) diluted 1/10000 in 5% milk PBS-T 0,1% at Room temperature
Wash membranes with PBS-T 0,1% for 10 minutes, 5 times at Room temperature : PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00 PBS-T 00:10:00
Develop membranes using ECL Prime (GE Healthcare) for at least 00:10:00
creator: Eduard Bentea
